changes: Added check_comparability() to harness/domain_support/comparator.py
Upgraded strict_same_universe_compare to PRIMARY compare口径 in life_agent.py
Frozen baseline compare now marked as reference_only with comparability fields
Strict compare summary now includes comparability report with comparison_role: primary
Candidate vs baseline report updated to note frozen baseline is historical reference only
Harness payload metric_context updated to reference strict_same_universe_compare as primary
Added check_comparability() function to harness/domain_support/comparator.py
Checks 6 keys: eval_scope, sample_universe, split_strategy, label_definition, feature_contract_hash, task_scope
Returns: comparable, severity, mismatches, recommended_action, comparison_role
Severity logic: blocking_keys (label_definition, sample_universe, eval_scope) -> block_decision
Severity logic: warning_keys (split_strategy, feature_contract_hash) -> reference_only
Frozen baseline compare uses comparability check -> marks as reference_only if universe mismatch
Strict compare uses comparability check -> marks as primary when all keys match
compare_candidate_to_baseline() now accepts optional comparability_report parameter
Created life_primary_metric_summary.json with layered AUC definitions
display_auc_same_sample_clean_holdout: in-distribution performance
display_auc_strict_comparable: fair baseline comparison
display_auc_temporal_generalization: out-of-time stability
recommended_primary_auc: temporal if available, else strict, else same-sample
best_case_auc, robust_auc, gap, interpretation fields added
Honest eval report updated with primary_metric section
Fusion input quality_metrics updated with best_case_auc, robust_auc, reported_primary_auc
Credibility summary updated with recommended_primary_auc fields
Warnings updated to check recommended_primary_auc < 0.8 threshold
Created life_label_validity_audit.json with structured proxy credibility fields
label_type: proxy
proxy_reconstruction_risk: low/medium/high based on stress tests
external_truth_available: false
release_block_reason: clearly stated
predictive_validity_level: structured
production_readiness_level: not_releaseable_for_prod
truth_gap_checklist: 4 items (external_truth, temporal_stability, cross_domain, prospective_validation)
Created life_truth_validation_gap_checklist.json as standalone file
Honest eval report updated with label_validity section
Temporal generalization now has status/exception_message fields
Default state: status=skipped, exception_message=None
On success: status=completed
On failure: status=failed, exception_message captured, conclusion updated
Proxy stress test already had try/except wrapper (from previous patch)
All diagnostic failures write to report files, don't crash main flow
Life agent result always written even if diagnostics fail
Updated sport/src/__init__.py to re-export from sportagent directory
Updated sport/src/sport_agent.py to add sportagent to sys.path
Updated sport/src/sport_agent.py run_sport_pipeline to import from sportagent
Updated harness/domain_agents/sport/sport_agent_stub.py to delegate to real implementation
Sport adapter now returns tolerated status instead of not_implemented
All sport files remain in sport/sportagent/ (no file movement needed)

harness_new_capabilities.description: Unified pre-compare gate that checks eval_scope, sample_universe, split_strategy, label_definition, feature_contract_hash, task_scope
Compare output now includes comparability field with same_sample_universe, same_eval_scope, same_label_definition, strict_comparable, comparison_role

life_status.reason_not_releaseable: proxy label without external truth validation

remaining_gaps: External truth validation for life proxy label (critical)
Cross-domain consistency between study and life risk scores (medium)
Study domain should also use check_comparability for its compare logic (future work)
next_steps: Obtain external truth labels for life domain validation
Run prospective validation on future cohort
Implement cross-domain consistency checks between study and life
Extend check_comparability to study domain compare logic
